Euclid Surface Photometry Pipeline
  • Figures directory
  • View page source

Figures directory

Place the paper figures here as PDF or PNG files. The documentation references the following figure names (taken from the paper Euclid_disc_breaks.pdf):

Required figures

  • Euclid_Pipeline.pdf — Full pipeline illustration (Fig. 2 in the paper). Showcases all five modules for galaxy EUCL J040743.76−465230.1.

  • EUC_SEGMID_-612927984481008950_mask_segment.pdf — Mask comparison figure for EUCL J040510.27−444836.3 (Fig. 3 in the paper).

  • sample_criteria.pdf — Stellar mass vs. redshift for the selected sample (Fig. 1 in the paper).

  • average_profiles_VIS.pdf — Stacked normalised SB profiles by break type (Fig. 5 in the paper).

  • breaks_histograms_separated.pdf — Distributions of structural parameters by break type (Fig. 6 in the paper).

  • rbreak_vs_h.pdf — Break radius vs. inner / outer scale length (Fig. 7 in the paper).

  • Type_vs_redshift_grid.pdf — Evolution of disc break fractions with redshift (Fig. 8 in the paper).

All figures are from Sánchez-Alarcón et al. (2026, A&A). The paper PDF Euclid_disc_breaks.pdf is included here for reference.
